Off Calendar Jul-22-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:HANS RUSCHKE, ESQ. for defendant and moving party; GEOFFREY SPELLBERG, ESQ. for plaintiff and opposing party.

DEFENDANT ANTS SOFTWARE INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION's Motion for Protective Order is DENIED. The deposition of Mr. Kozak is hereby ordered to take place in California. JUDGE: MONICA F. WILEY. NOT REPORTED.

Notice And Motion Compelling Deposition And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-22-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: GEOFFRE SPELLBERG, ESQ. for plaintiff and moving party;HANS RUSCHKE, ESQ. for defendant and opposing party.
After hearing, tentative ruling is adopted as modified.
PLAINTIFF KEN RUOTOLO's Motion to Compel Attendance at Deposition is GRANTED. Defendant shall produce Joseph Kozak for deposition on or before August 13, 2010. Plaintiff's Request for a body attachment pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure section 1993 is denied. Plaintiff's Request for Sanctions pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure Section 2025.440(b) is GRANTED in the amount of $150. JUDGE: MONICA F. WILEY. NOT REPORTED.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Protective
Off Calendar Jun-09-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES:

Hans Christian Ruschke, Esq. for defendant and moving party: ANTS SOFTWARE INC.

Geoffrey Spellberg, Esq. for plaintiff and opposing party: KEN RUOTOLO.

After hearing, DEFENDANT ANTS SOFTWARE INC.'s Motion For Protective Order is denied. Order signed. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.

COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Furthe Rresponses To Documents Requests;
Off Calendar May-18-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Geoffrey Spellberg, Atty. for Plaintiff and moving party: Ken Ruotolo
Hans Christian N. Ruschke, Atty. for Defendant and opposing party: Ants Software, Inc,

RULING: HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: PLAINTIFF KEN RUOTOLO's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Documents Requests is moot in part and granted in part. The motion is moot as to Number 25, and it has been withdrawn. The motion is granted as to No. 19. The motion is granted as to Number 26 as all responsive documents shall be produced upon the entry of a Confidentiality Order. Order was signed in open court. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.

DEFENDANT ANTS SOFTWARE INCORPORATED'S Motion To Compel Compliance With Defendat's Inspection Demand, Set One IS OFF CALENDAR AND TO BE RENOTICED IN THE DISCOVERY DEPARTMENT. Judge: Paul H. Alvarado, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR # 5797 =301/PHA

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-28-2010 Set For Trial On Aug-16-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Jul-27-10 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 502

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Document Requests And Interrogatories; Memorandum Of P/A And Declaration Of Geoffrey Spellberg
Off Calendar Jan-28-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Geoffrey Spellberg, Atty. for Plaintiff and moving party: Ken Routolo
Hans Cristian N. Ruschke, Atty. for Defendant and opposing party: Ants Software, Inc.

RULING: HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED AS MODIFIED: Plaintiff Ken Ruotolo's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Documents Requests And Interrogatories is granted in part and denied in part. The motion is granted as to Interrogatory Nos. 1-15.
The motion is denied as to Document Request Numbers 2, 3, 13, and 14 as they are overly broad.
The motion is denied as to Document Request Number 5 as overly broad and irrelevant and as it invades the right of privacy of third parties without good cause.
The motion is granted as to Document Request Numbers 6 and 12.
The motion is denied as to Document Request Number 11 as it is irrelevant and overly broad.
The motion is denied as to Document Request Numbers 13 and 14 as they are overly broad.
Further responses and production of documents shall be made within 15 days of notice of this order.
All requests for sanctions are denied.
MODIFICATIONS:
Numbers 2 & 3 and 13 & 14 are modified to limit subjet matter. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.
